/usr/sbin/c++ -fPIC -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/AuroraAir_shared.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libAuroraAir.so -o libAuroraAir.so CMakeFiles/AuroraAir_shared.dir/Type.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AuroraAir_shared.dir/Constant.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AuroraAir_shared.dir/Instruction.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AuroraAir_shared.dir/BasicBlock.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AuroraAir_shared.dir/Function.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AuroraAir_shared.dir/Module.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AuroraAir_shared.dir/Builder.cpp.o  ../ADT/libAuroraADT.a
